sections.paragraph:
verb לחשוק

to desire, covet, crave for; hoop, fasten

verb להיחשק

be desired, coveted, craved; fastened; hooped

verb לחשק

to fasten, unite, hoop, gird; restrain, limit, rein in

verb חושק (>>חֻשַּׁק)

be fastened; hooped, girded

verb להתחשק

to desire, feel like, have an urge for

masculine noun

desire, longing, lust, zest, lustfulness
